name: @spectotal/direc-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the direc CLI and related Spectotal tooling.

scripts.build:workspaces: npm run build --workspace=direc-workflow-runtime && npm run build --workspace=direc-analysis-runtime && npm run build --workspace=direc-automation-runtime && npm run build --workspace=direc-facet-detect && npm run build --workspace=direc-adapter-direc && npm run build --workspace=direc-adapter-openspec && npm run build --workspace=direc-plugin-js-complexity && npm run build --workspace=direc-plugin-js-architecture-drift && npm run build --workspace=direc-telemetry && npm run build --workspace=direc
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.release:publish: node ./scripts/ensure-clean-worktree.mjs && npm run check && changeset publish
scripts.test: npm run build:workspaces && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:workspaces && npm run typecheck:workspaces
